summary: NXP Semiconductors N.V. (NASDAQ:NXPI) was among Jim Cramer’s stock calls on Mad Money recently as he recapped mega-cap tech earnings. headline: Semiconductor ETFs SOXX, SMH Just Logged Their Best Month Ever — What's Driving This Rally?
summary: SOXX posts its largest monthly return in 25 years. SMH had its best month since November 2003. Yet Nvidia — the AI hardware leader of the prior cycle — was the slowest-moving mega-cap chipmaker in the basket. Intel, AMD, Micron and Marvell did the work.
